ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the review is for */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_location" TEXT /* Location of the reviewer */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of the review (e.g., product, service, unboxing) */,
  "review_images" TEXT /* URLs of images included in the review */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "is_feature_review" INTEGER /* Indicates if the review is focused on a specific feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature if the review is a feature review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Short title for the review */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., website, mobile app) */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the review */,
  "day_diff" INTEGER /* Difference in days from a reference date */,
  "helpful_yes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful yes votes */,
  "helpful_no" INTEGER /* Number of helpful no votes */,
  "total_vote" INTEGER /* Total number of votes */,
  "score_pos_neg_diff" INTEGER /* Difference between the number of positive and negative votes */,
  "score_average_rating" REAL /* Average rating score */,
  "wilson_lower_bound" REAL /* Wilson score lower bound for the review */,
  "polarity" REAL /* Polarity score of the review (range -1 to 1) */,
  "subjectivity" REAL /* Subjectivity score of the review (range 0 to 1) */,
  "sentiment" TEXT /* Sentiment of the review (Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "product_ratings_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of ratings (1-5 stars) */,
  "product_last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the product */,
  "product_features" TEXT /* Key features of the product */,
  "product_reviews_last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the reviews of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the metrics are associated with */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the product */,
  "positive_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of positive reviews */,
  "negative_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of negative reviews */,
  "neutral_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of neutral reviews */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of helpful votes */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes */,
  "wilson_score" REAL /* Wilson score for the product */,
  "polarity_score" REAL /* Average polarity score of the reviews */,
  "subjectivity_score" REAL /* Average subjectivity score of the reviews */,
  "product_last_reviewed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last review for the product */,
  "top_reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the top reviewer (most helpful or influential) */,
  "top_review_score" REAL /* Score of the top review */,
  "most_common_features_mentioned" TEXT /* Most commonly mentioned features in reviews */,
  "sentiment_trend" TEXT /* Trend of sentiment over time (e.g., improving, declining) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_metrics_top_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("top_reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_metrics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_location" TEXT /* Location of the reviewer */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews by the reviewer */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by the reviewer */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of helpful votes received by the reviewer */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the reviewer */,
  "reputation_score" REAL /* Reputation score of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id")
)
column_names: ID of the product the review is for
